MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-18-2017 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CHASE BANK USA, N.A'S DEMURRER AND GENERAL DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT, AS TO THE THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION IN THE COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ERIK BEINART IS SUSTAINTED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. BASED ON THE FACTS ALLEGED, CHASE BANK DID NOT OWE ANY DUTY TO PREVENT OR MITIGATE THE HARM ALLEGEDLY SUFFERED BY MR. BEINART. BECAUSE THERE DOES NOT APPEAR ANY REASONABLY POSSIBILITY THAT MR. BEINART CAN ALLEGE SUFFICIENT FACTS TO SUPPORT SUCH A DUTY, MR. BEINART'S REQUEST FOR LEAVE TO AMEND IS DENIED. WRITTEN ORDER IS SIGNED AND FILED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: JOSE RIOS MERIDA; REPORTER: NOT REPORTED. (D302)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-14-2017 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-01-2017 Set For Trial On Sep-11-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-18-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Michelle Park Chiu of the law offices of Morgan Lewis & Bockius LLP (415.442.1184) appears as counsel for defendant/moving party, Chase Bank USA

No other appearance is made in this matter

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT CHASE BANK USA, N.A's DEMURRER AND GENERAL DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT, as to the third cause of action in the complaint filed by plaintiff Erik Beinart is SUSTAINTED without leave to amend. Based on the facts alleged, Chase Bank did not owe any duty to prevent or mitigate the harm allegedly suffered by Mr. Beinart. Because there does not appear any reasonably possibility that Mr. Beinart can allege sufficient facts to support such a duty, Mr. Beinart's request for leave to amend is denied. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: not reported. (D302)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-28-2016 Continued To Jan-18-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
